title: lippia rugosa
intro: Lippia rugosa, also known as Mexican oregano or Mexican marjoram, is a shrub native to Central America and Mexico. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lippia rugosa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Lippia rugosa can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used as a dried herb in various herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
